title: Wildfang® chewing root from the tree heather for dogs, robust and durable chewing root for dogs, splinter-free chewing wood as a dog toy for optimal dental care for dogs and puppies - S
features: Protect your furniture and let your dog chew on the popular, durable and robust chewing root made from the heather tree. Chewing toy for dogs 3 in 1: Dog activity - teeth cleaning - training of the chewing muscles. In addition, the chewing toy for puppies and large dogs can help with stress management or also help protect your furniture if your furry friend likes to nibble on the furniture.
description: splinter-free chewing wood as a dog toy for optimal dental care for dogs and puppies
